input_text: Viralkan muka dia! Share sampai habis satu Malaysia tahu siapa perempuan ni. Jangan bagi dia lari!
reason: Incites online mob to expose and harass a specific individual, constituting a pile-on with doxxing intent.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah dengan individu ini, buat laporan polis dan biarkan pihak berkuasa menangani kes ini.

input_text: These Indians always come late to work, no wonder our department KPI so low. Should just replace them all with people who actually work.
reason: Attributes workplace performance issues to an entire ethnic group, promoting discriminatory workplace attitudes.
suggested_rewrite: Punctuality is an issue in our department affecting KPIs. Management should enforce time policies equally for everyone.

input_text: 华人嫁马来人的都是叛徒，背叛自己的种族和文化，活该被家人断绝关系
reason: Labels interethnic marriage as racial betrayal, attacking individuals who marry across ethnic lines and promoting communal division.
suggested_rewrite: 跨族婚姻是个人选择，每个人都有权利选择自己的伴侣，我们应该尊重彼此的决定。

input_text: இந்த மலாய் கம்பெனியில வேலை பண்ணா எப்பவும் இந்தியன்ஸ்க்கு promotion கிடைக்காது. ரேசிஸ்ட் நாட்டு ரேசிஸ்ட் boss
reason: Generalizes workplace grievance into a blanket attack on an ethnic group and labels the entire country as racist.
suggested_rewrite: எனது நிறுவனத்தில் பதவி உயர்வு வழங்குவதில் சில நியாயமற்ற நடைமுறைகள் இருப்பதாக உணர்கிறேன். இதை HR அல்லது தொழிலாளர் துறையிடம் புகார் அளிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Bro area Subang ni dah jadi macam Little India dah. Bau kari everywhere, parking pun semua kereta India. Kita orang asal pun dah rasa macam pendatang. Share kalau setuju!
reason: Frames an ethnic community's presence in a neighborhood as an invasion, using derogatory stereotypes and calling for viral agreement.
suggested_rewrite: Kawasan Subang semakin sesak dan ada isu parking. Pihak majlis perbandaran patut menambah kemudahan untuk semua penduduk.

input_text: This SJKC teacher only speaks Mandarin in class. Malay students in the school cannot understand anything. Chinese schools are destroying national unity lah!
reason: Escalates a legitimate education concern into an attack on Chinese-medium schools as threats to national unity.
suggested_rewrite: Teachers in national-type schools should ensure all students can follow lessons. The education ministry should review language policies to support effective learning for everyone.

input_text: Viralkan! Bos Cina ni potong gaji pekerja Melayu tapi bagi bonus kat staff Cina dia. Nama dia [nama]. Share nombor phone dia 012-XXX biar dia rasa!
reason: Shares partial personal information to incite mob harassment against an individual while framing the issue along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: Jika majikan mendiskriminasi pekerja dalam hal gaji atau bonus, buat aduan rasmi kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Mereka boleh menyiasat kes ini.

input_text: 哈哈JAKIM的人自己吃猪肉然后来管我们。这些宗教局的人都是伪君子，伊斯兰教就是这样双重标准的
reason: Uses unverified claims about religious authority personnel to mock Islam broadly, crossing from institutional criticism into religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教执法机构应以身作则，确保执行标准的一致性。如果有违规行为，应通过正式渠道进行投诉。

input_text: Semua penyokong DAP ni kafir harbi, halal darah diorang. Undi DAP sama macam undi kristianisasi Malaysia!
reason: Uses extreme religious labeling (kafir harbi, halal darah) against a political party's supporters and links political support to religious subversion.
suggested_rewrite: Saya tidak bersetuju dengan beberapa dasar DAP. Pengundi berhak memilih mana-mana parti dan kita harus berdebat tentang dasar, bukan menyerang pendirian agama orang lain.

input_text: This Malay girl at my office wears tudung but dates Chinese guys. Hypocrite Muslim. Someone should tell her parents what their daughter is doing behind their back.
reason: Publicly shames an individual for perceived religious hypocrisy, threatens to expose her private life, and degrades her personal choices.
suggested_rewrite: People's personal relationships and religious practice are their own private matters. It's not our place to judge or expose others.

input_text: Jangan beli rumah kat area tu, dah ramai sangat Bangla dengan Nepal. Harga mesti jatuh nanti. Forward kat group lain supaya orang tahu.
reason: Frames foreign workers' presence as a property devaluation threat, promoting xenophobic neighborhood discrimination and urging viral spread.
suggested_rewrite: Sebelum membeli rumah, kaji keadaan persekitaran, kemudahan awam, dan potensi pelaburan. Rujuk ejen hartanah yang bertauliah untuk nasihat profesional.

input_text: PAS supporters semua kampung mentality. No wonder Kelantan still backwards. Keep voting PAS lah, enjoy your flood every year 😂
reason: Insults an entire political base as backward and mocks their suffering from natural disasters, degrading rural communities.
suggested_rewrite: I believe Kelantan's flood management needs improvement. Voters should evaluate all parties' infrastructure plans and hold elected officials accountable for disaster preparedness.

input_text: Taman ni dulu aman, sekarang rumah sebelah sewa kat pekerja kilang semua Myanmar. Bising, kotor, sampah merata. Tag majlis perbandaran! Viralkan sampai MP turun!
reason: Attributes neighborhood cleanliness issues to a national group's presence, dehumanizing foreign workers and calling for mob pressure.
suggested_rewrite: Taman kami menghadapi isu kebersihan dan kebisingan. Saya telah membuat aduan kepada majlis perbandaran dan berharap MP dapat membantu menyelesaikan masalah ini untuk semua penduduk.

input_text: 这些马来人的婚礼太吵了，每次kenduri都放音乐到半夜。住在他们旁边真是倒霉，这种人没有教养
reason: Generalizes noise complaints into an ethnic attack, labeling an entire community as lacking manners.
suggested_rewrite: 邻居举办活动时音乐声太大影响了休息。我会礼貌地和他们沟通，或向地方当局反映噪音问题。

input_text: இந்த ஏரியாவில் எல்லா கடைகளும் சைனீஸ் ஓனர் தான். இந்தியனுக்கு ஒரு சான்ஸும் கொடுக்க மாட்டாங்க. அவங்க எல்லாரும் ரேசிஸ்ட்
reason: Labels all Chinese business owners in an area as racist, escalating business competition grievances into ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: இந்த பகுதியில் வணிக வாய்ப்புகளை அதிகரிக்க அரசாங்க உதவித் திட்டங்களை பயன்படுத்தலாம். நியாயமான வணிக போட்டியை ஊக்குவிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Hahaha pergi lah report JAKIM. JAKIM tu sendiri pun tak ikut Islam. Buat duit je kerja diorang. Islam kat Malaysia ni Islam versi government je, bukan Islam sebenar.
reason: Moves from criticizing a religious institution to delegitimizing the practice of Islam in Malaysia entirely, mocking state religious practice.
suggested_rewrite: JAKIM perlu lebih telus dan bertanggungjawab dalam menjalankan tugas mereka. Kritikan membina terhadap institusi agama boleh membantu meningkatkan perkhidmatan mereka.

input_text: My Tamil neighbor's Deepavali fireworks almost burned my house. These people have no consideration. Every year same thing. Indians and their nonsense festivals.
reason: Escalates a legitimate safety complaint into an attack on Indian festivals and culture, denigrating Deepavali celebrations broadly.
suggested_rewrite: Fireworks near residential areas are dangerous. I've reported the safety concern to local authorities. Festival celebrations should follow safety regulations to protect everyone.

input_text: Viralkan muka mamat ni! Dia yang curi motor kat Puchong. Kalau nampak terus hentam. Orang macam ni tak payah bawa mahkamah, settlekan je!
reason: Shares an individual's image to incite vigilante violence, encouraging mob justice instead of legal processes.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda menjadi mangsa kecurian, buat laporan polis dengan segera dan berikan maklumat serta bukti yang ada. Biarkan pihak berkuasa menjalankan siasatan.

input_text: 华人不要再投马华了，那些马来政客只会利用我们的税钱去养懒惰的马来人。他们什么都要special treatment
reason: Characterizes an entire ethnic group as lazy and living off others' taxes, promoting deep communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 税收分配政策应该透明公正，惠及所有马来西亚人。我们可以通过正当渠道倡导更公平的经济政策。

input_text: Kalau kahwin Cina, anak kau confirm jadi murtad. Jangan menyesal nanti bila masuk neraka. Aku dah warn.
reason: Uses religious damnation threats to discourage interethnic marriage, combining religious intimidation with communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur melibatkan pelbagai pertimbangan termasuk agama. Pasangan boleh mendapatkan nasihat daripada kaunselor perkahwinan dan pihak agama untuk membuat keputusan yang bijak.

input_text: Share this! This ustaz was caught in a hotel with a woman who is not his wife. Typical lah these religious leaders. All the same. Forward to all groups!
reason: Spreads unverified allegations about a religious figure's private life to mock religious leaders broadly, violating privacy and denigrating religious authority.
suggested_rewrite: If there are credible allegations of misconduct by a religious leader, report them to the appropriate religious authority. Spreading unverified claims harms everyone involved.

input_text: Melayu kerja gomen je pandai, masuk private sector confirm tak perform. Sebab tu la company aku tak nak hire Melayu. Malas semua.
reason: Promotes ethnic-based hiring discrimination and broadly insults an ethnic group's work ethic, violating dignity and communal harmony.
suggested_rewrite: Prestasi kerja bergantung kepada individu, bukan kaum. Syarikat harus menilai calon berdasarkan kelayakan dan pengalaman tanpa mengira latar belakang etnik.

input_text: 这个马来女人在公司每天五次祈祷，一次半小时，其他人都在加班。凭什么她有special treatment？伊斯兰教就是这样懒的借口
reason: Attacks Islamic prayer practice as laziness, mocking religious obligations and personally targeting a colleague's faith.
suggested_rewrite: 公司应制定明确的休息时间政策，公平对待所有员工的需求，包括宗教义务。如有不公，可向HR反映。

input_text: இந்த Chinese கம்பனி interview-ல Mandarin must என்று போடுறாங்க, ஆனா job-க்கு Mandarin தேவையே இல்ல. Racist dogs, இந்த Chinese எல்லாரும் ஒரே மாதிரி
reason: Escalates a valid workplace language policy concern into dehumanizing slurs against an entire ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: சில நிறுவனங்கள் தேவையில்லாமல் மொழித் தகுதிகளை வைக்கின்றன. இது பற்றி தொழிலாளர் துறையிடம் புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: Mak bapak budak ni tak reti didik anak ke? Tengok lah perangai macam samseng. Memang darah keturunan pun macam tu. Viralkan supaya malu!
reason: Publicly shames a family and child, attributing behavior to bloodline while calling for viral humiliation.
suggested_rewrite: Tingkah laku antisosial perlu ditangani melalui saluran yang betul seperti pihak sekolah atau kaunselor. Memalukan keluarga secara terbuka tidak menyelesaikan masalah.

input_text: Parking depan rumah aku tapi kereta ada sticker Guan Eng. Of course lah Cina, langgar rules pun buat tak tahu. Dah ambik gambar, share everywhere!
reason: Links a minor parking violation to ethnicity and political affiliation, using it to reinforce stereotypes while attempting to publicly shame the individual.
suggested_rewrite: Ada kereta yang meletak di tempat yang tidak sepatutnya di depan rumah saya. Saya akan hubungi MBPJ untuk tindakan penguatkuasaan.

input_text: Don't rent to Malays. They will turn your condo into a kenduri hall every weekend. Noise complaints, parking issues, the whole lot. Learn from my mistake.
reason: Promotes ethnic-based rental discrimination, stereotyping Malay tenants broadly based on one negative experience.
suggested_rewrite: When renting out property, include clear terms about noise levels, parking, and event hosting. Screen tenants based on references and rental history, not ethnicity.

input_text: JAIS ni asyik tangkap orang je kerja. Sikit-sikit khalwat, sikit-sikit tutup premis. Padahal agama Islam tu sendiri pun penuh dengan contradictions. Korang ni memang agama paksaan.
reason: Escalates criticism of a religious enforcement body into mocking Islam as inherently contradictory and coercive.
suggested_rewrite: JAIS perlu menjalankan penguatkuasaan dengan lebih adil dan berperikemanusiaan. Kritikan terhadap pendekatan penguatkuasaan boleh disalurkan melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Ada orang share ni. Cikgu sekolah agama ni rupanya ada hubungan dengan murid. Ni gambar dia dan kereta dia. Plate number WXX 1234. Sebarkan!
reason: Spreads unverified serious allegations with identifying information including vehicle plate number, constituting doxxing and potentially defamatory claims.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan salah laku yang serius oleh guru harus dilaporkan kepada polis dan pihak sekolah, bukan disebarkan di media sosial. Biarkan siasatan rasmi dijalankan.

input_text: Every time election come, these Malay politicians play the race card. Then the kampung Malays all fall for it like sheep. No critical thinking at all in that community.
reason: Dehumanizes rural Malay voters as mindless sheep, broadly insulting an entire community's intelligence.
suggested_rewrite: Racial politicking during elections is a concern. All voters deserve access to fair, policy-based information to make informed choices, and politicians should be held accountable for divisive rhetoric.

input_text: 印度人结婚放那个音乐真的要死，又吵又难听。整个taman都被他们搞得像贫民窟一样。受不了了
reason: Attacks Indian wedding celebrations with derogatory language and compares their neighborhood presence to a slum.
suggested_rewrite: 社区活动的噪音有时会影响到邻居。可以礼貌地与主办方沟通，或向地方当局反映噪音管制问题。

input_text: Perempuan ni kerja GRO tapi claim kena rogol. Tengok la cara pakai baju pun macam tu. Mesti dia yang ajak. Forward gambar dia ni kat semua group.
reason: Blames a sexual assault victim based on appearance and occupation, while distributing her image without consent to shame her.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan rogol perlu disiasat oleh polis tanpa mengira pekerjaan atau penampilan mangsa. Jangan sebarkan gambar atau maklumat peribadi mangsa.

input_text: Apahal la Cina ni semua kedekut. Interview kat company Cina, offer gaji ciput. Dah la kerja macam kuli. Memang perangai bangsa dia macam tu.
reason: Attributes unfair salary offers to an ethnic trait, broadly insulting Chinese Malaysians as stingy.
suggested_rewrite: Saya mendapat tawaran gaji yang rendah di syarikat tersebut. Pekerja harus mengetahui kadar gaji pasaran dan berunding dengan yakin, atau melaporkan pelanggaran gaji minimum.

input_text: Siapa kenal perempuan ni? Share kat semua group. Dia yang langgar lari kat Petaling Jaya semalam. Muka dah ada, kereta pun dah ada. Cari dia sampai dapat!
reason: Incites a manhunt against an individual based on unverified hit-and-run allegations, sharing identifying information for mob justice.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda menyaksikan kemalangan langgar lari, ambil gambar plat nombor dan laporkan kepada polis. Biarkan pihak berkuasa mengenal pasti dan menangkap suspek.

input_text: UMNO supporters are the real parasites of this country. Living off government contracts while the rest of us suffer. Bunch of entitled Malays who think this country belongs to them.
reason: Dehumanizes political supporters as parasites and ties political criticism to ethnic attacks on Malays broadly.
suggested_rewrite: Government contract processes should be transparent and merit-based. Political parties should be held accountable for cronyism regardless of their ethnic base.

input_text: Confirm la budak sekolah Cina ni semua kiasu. Tengok exam results pun nak claim semua top. Sistem sekolah Cina tu ajar anak-anak jadi selfish.
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese school students as selfish and kiasu, attacking an entire education system based on ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pendidikan di Malaysia perlu menggalakkan kerjasama selain kecemerlangan akademik. Semua jenis sekolah boleh menambah baik pendekatan mereka.

input_text: My Malay colleague takes MC every other week. Typical lah. That's why their race always needs special help. Cannot compete on equal footing.
reason: Generalizes one colleague's behavior to an entire race, framing it as proof of racial inferiority in the workplace.
suggested_rewrite: Frequent medical leave affects team productivity. This should be addressed by management through proper HR processes, not by making assumptions about any racial group.

input_text: 那些马来人的halal规定太过分了，连non-halal的餐厅都要关。马来西亚不是只有穆斯林，别把你们的宗教强加在别人身上
reason: Frames halal regulations as religious imposition on non-Muslims, crossing from policy criticism into hostility toward Muslim religious practice.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的食品法规应该在维护宗教需求和尊重多元文化之间找到平衡。各方可以通过对话达成共识。

input_text: Budak batch kita yang kahwin India tu dah mula tukar perangai. Cakap pun dah macam diorang. Nampak sangat hilang jati diri Melayu. Kesian keluarga dia.
reason: Shames a person for adopting their spouse's cultural traits, framing interethnic cultural exchange as loss of identity worthy of pity.
suggested_rewrite: Dalam perkahwinan campur, pasangan sering berkongsi budaya masing-masing. Ini adalah pengalaman peribadi mereka dan patut dihormati.

input_text: இந்த area-ல எல்லா property agent-உம் Chinese. Indian client வந்தா rate வேற, Chinese client வந்தா rate வேற. Racist @#$%!
reason: Makes unverified claims of discriminatory pricing by ethnicity and uses profanity to attack an ethnic group broadly.
suggested_rewrite: வீட்டு வாடகை அல்லது விற்பனையில் பாகுபாடு இருப்பதாக சந்தேகித்தால், புகாரை நுகர்வோர் நீதிமன்றம் அல்லது தொடர்புடைய அதிகாரிகளிடம் அளிக்கலாம்.

input_text: Ustazah kat sekolah anak aku ajar yang non-Muslim semua akan masuk neraka. Bila parents complain, sekolah cover up. These Islamic schools are breeding intolerance!
reason: Escalates a specific incident complaint into a broad attack on Islamic schools as breeding grounds for intolerance.
suggested_rewrite: If a teacher makes exclusionary statements about other religions, parents should raise this formally with school administration and the education ministry. Schools should teach respect for all faiths.

input_text: Alahai PH supporters ni semua liberal sangat. Nak bagi LGBT rights lah, nak mansuhkan hukum Islam lah. Pengkhianat bangsa dan agama semua ni!
reason: Labels political supporters as traitors to race and religion, combining political disagreement with accusations of religious betrayal.
suggested_rewrite: Saya tidak bersetuju dengan beberapa dasar PH. Perbezaan pendapat politik adalah normal dalam demokrasi dan harus dibincangkan dengan hormat tanpa melabel orang sebagai pengkhianat.

input_text: Friend forwarded this - apparently the new HOA chairperson (Chinese aunty) only approved renovations for Chinese homeowners. Here's her unit number and phone. Someone needs to confront her.
reason: Shares personal details of an individual while making unverified ethnic discrimination claims, encouraging confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: If HOA decisions seem unfair, attend the next AGM to raise concerns formally. Document specific cases and request transparent approval criteria that apply equally to all residents.

input_text: Mak cik India sebelah rumah ni bela kucing berpuluh ekor. Bau busuk satu jalan. Memang la India suka hidup macam ni. Kotor memang tabiat diorang.
reason: Attributes a neighbor's animal hoarding to an ethnic trait, degrading the entire Indian community as inherently dirty.
suggested_rewrite: Jiran saya memelihara terlalu banyak kucing yang menyebabkan masalah kebersihan. Saya akan buat aduan kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan mengenai isu ini.

input_text: 看到那个viral video没有？Malay女生偷东西被抓。这就是他们的文化，从小就这样教的。Share出去让大家看看
reason: Uses a single incident to condemn an entire ethnic group's culture and upbringing, urging viral spread of this narrative.
suggested_rewrite: 偷窃是个人行为，不应归咎于任何族群的文化。如果目睹犯罪行为，请报警处理。

input_text: எந்த மலாய் party வந்தாலும் Indians-க்கு ஒரு benefit-உம் கிடைக்காது. இந்த நாட்டுல நாம எப்பவும் second class citizen தான். Malays எல்லாரும் selfish
reason: Escalates political frustration into labeling all Malays as selfish and framing it as ethnic oppression broadly.
suggested_rewrite: இந்திய சமூகத்தின் நலன்களை எல்லா அரசியல் கட்சிகளும் கவனிக்க வேண்டும். வாக்காளர்களாக நாம் கொள்கைகளை ஆராய்ந்து நமது குரலை உயர்த்த வேண்டும்.

input_text: Aku dah screen capture semua conversation dia kat group. Besok aku post satu-satu. Biar semua orang tahu muka sebenar perempuan munafik ni. Stay tuned.
reason: Threatens to expose private conversations to publicly humiliate a specific person, constituting premeditated targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada perselisihan peribadi, selesaikan secara tertutup atau melalui mediator. Mendedahkan perbualan peribadi orang lain adalah pelanggaran privasi.

input_text: Semua developer Cina ni penipu. Beli rumah janji bulan bintang tapi quality macam sampah. Memang darah Cina suka tipu orang. Jangan trust developer Cina!
reason: Attributes poor construction quality to ethnic character, labeling all Chinese developers as cheats based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Pembeli rumah harus menyemak rekod prestasi pemaju, membaca kontrak dengan teliti, dan membuat aduan kepada Tribunal Pembeli Rumah jika ada masalah kualiti.

input_text: The fact that Malay students get matrikulasi spots while non-Malays have to fight for STPM shows this country is fundamentally racist. Apartheid Malaysia!
reason: Compares Malaysia's education system to apartheid, escalating a policy critique into inflammatory communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: The university admission system should be reviewed to ensure fair access for all qualified students. Policy discussions should focus on improving opportunities without inflammatory comparisons.

input_text: Anak aku cakap cikgu sekolah kebangsaan suruh budak bukan Islam keluar kelas masa doa. Pastu suruh duduk luar macam anjing. Ini sekolah ke kem latihan agama?
reason: Uses dehumanizing language (macam anjing) to describe the situation and attacks the school system as religious indoctrination camp.
suggested_rewrite: Anak saya berkata pelajar bukan Islam diminta keluar semasa doa. Saya akan berbincang dengan pihak sekolah supaya semua pelajar dilayan dengan hormat dan ada ruang yang sesuai disediakan.

input_text: Wah ini perempuan TikTok tu dah kena kantoi. Lepas ni confirm ramai lagi yang akan expose dia. Like and share supaya algorithm push naik. Kita cancel dia sama-sama!
reason: Orchestrates a coordinated social media pile-on to cancel an individual, weaponizing algorithms for harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang melakukan kesalahan, biar mereka bertanggungjawab melalui saluran yang betul. Serangan beramai-ramai di media sosial boleh merosakkan kesihatan mental seseorang.

input_text: These Chinese schools refuse to celebrate Hari Malaysia properly. Still want to be part of this country but don't want to integrate. Pendatang mentality never changes.
reason: Uses the historically charged 'pendatang' slur to attack Chinese Malaysians' patriotism based on school celebration practices.
suggested_rewrite: All schools should be encouraged to celebrate national events meaningfully. The education ministry can work with all school types to foster patriotism in culturally inclusive ways.

input_text: Bro jangan apply company tu. Semua management orang India. Confirm crony system, promote sesama sendiri je. Outsiders tak akan naik.
reason: Attributes workplace nepotism to ethnicity, warning others away from a company based on the ethnic makeup of its management.
suggested_rewrite: Sebelum memohon kerja, kaji budaya syarikat dan peluang perkembangan kerjaya. Jika ada amalan pilih kasih, laporkan kepada pihak berkenaan.

input_text: JAKIM spent RM1 billion but Muslim morality getting worse. Maybe because Islam itself cannot fix human nature 😂 Agama for show only la in Malaysia
reason: Uses JAKIM budget criticism as a springboard to mock Islam's efficacy entirely, ridiculing religious practice in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: JAKIM's budget allocation and effectiveness should be audited and reported transparently. Religious institutions should demonstrate measurable positive community impact.

input_text: Neighbor baru pindah masuk, apparently Muslim convert tapi still makan babi. Aku dah snap gambar dia beli char siu. Nak viralkan ke? Muallaf konon 😂
reason: Surveils and photographs a neighbor's personal food choices to publicly shame them for perceived religious hypocrisy, violating privacy.
suggested_rewrite: Perjalanan keagamaan setiap orang adalah peribadi. Jika anda prihatin, tawarkan sokongan dengan cara yang baik, bukan mendedahkan atau memalukan mereka.

input_text: 今天在mamak被一群马来仔欺负，他们说这里是tanah Melayu叫我滚回中国。华人在这个国家永远被当outsider
reason: While sharing a personal experience, generalizes it to claim all Chinese Malaysians are permanently treated as outsiders, fueling communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 今天遇到了不愉快的种族歧视事件，我已经报警处理。大多数马来西亚人是友善的，种族歧视行为应受到法律制裁。

input_text: Perempuan Melayu sekarang asyik nak kahwin mat salleh je. Gatal sangat. Padahal lelaki Melayu banyak yang lagi bagus. Dah jadi hamba orang putih.
reason: Sexually shames Malay women for their marriage choices and uses dehumanizing language (gatal, hamba) to degrade their autonomy.
suggested_rewrite: Pilihan pasangan hidup adalah hak peribadi setiap individu. Kita harus menghormati keputusan orang lain tanpa mengira latar belakang pasangan mereka.

input_text: These Tamil school students always cause problems in my area. Fighting, vandalism, smoking. Indian parents don't know how to raise their kids properly.
reason: Blames an entire ethnic community's parenting for youth behavioral issues near a Tamil school, stereotyping Indian parents.
suggested_rewrite: There are youth behavior concerns in our area that need attention. The school, parents, and community should work together on programs to address vandalism and other issues.

input_text: Masjid depan rumah aku pasang speaker kuat gila subuh-subuh. Aku complain kena bash. Islam ni memang tak reti respect orang lain punya tidur ke?
reason: Escalates a legitimate noise complaint about a mosque into an attack on Islam's regard for others.
suggested_rewrite: Bunyi pembesar suara masjid agak kuat pada waktu pagi. Saya akan berbincang dengan pihak masjid atau majlis perbandaran mengenai tahap bunyi yang sesuai untuk kawasan perumahan.

input_text: அந்த Malay guy என் sister-கிட்ட propose பண்ணான். நம்ம பொண்ணுங்களை Malay guys-கிட்ட கொடுக்கக் கூடாது. Convert பண்ணி culture-ஐ அழிப்பாங்க
reason: Frames interethnic marriage proposals as cultural destruction, promoting fear of religious conversion and communal isolation.
suggested_rewrite: குடும்ப உறுப்பினர்களின் திருமண முடிவுகளை மதிக்க வேண்டும். மத மாற்றம் பற்றிய கவலைகளை அன்புடன் பேசி தெளிவுபடுத்தலாம்.

input_text: Aku forward je video ni. Cina pukul Melayu depan kedai. Tapi polis tak buat apa sebab polis pun rasuah. Bangsa ni memang sombong sebab duit.
reason: Forwards unverified assault video with ethnic framing, makes baseless police corruption claims, and stereotypes Chinese Malaysians as arrogant.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda menyaksikan serangan, laporkan kepada polis dengan segera. Jika polis tidak bertindak, buat aduan rasmi kepada IPCMC atau pihak berkuasa yang berkaitan.

input_text: Property agent told me the landlord won't rent to Indians because 'they cook curry and the smell stays'. And people say racism doesn't exist in Malaysia lol
reason: While reporting discrimination, the framing amplifies the discriminatory statement and generalizes it to Malaysia broadly without seeking resolution.
suggested_rewrite: A property agent relayed discriminatory rental criteria from a landlord. This violates fair housing principles. I've reported this to the relevant authority and encourage others facing similar issues to do the same.

input_text: Tengok la gambar rumah flat PPR ni. Melayu semua. Sampah merata, lift rosak, grafiti sana sini. Memang mentality B40 takkan berubah. Nak tolong pun tak guna.
reason: Combines ethnic and class-based stereotyping to degrade low-income Malay communities, expressing contempt for the poor.
suggested_rewrite: Penyelenggaraan flat PPR perlu dipertingkatkan. Pihak berkuasa patut menyediakan perkhidmatan pengurusan yang lebih baik dan program komuniti untuk penduduk.

input_text: Screenshot dari group WhatsApp. Cikgu Cina ni panggil budak Melayu 'bodoh' dalam kelas. Ni phone number dia. Call ramai-ramai sampai dia resign!
reason: Shares a teacher's phone number to orchestrate mass harassment based on an unverified claim, with ethnic framing.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan bahawa guru menghina murid adalah serius. Ibu bapa harus membuat aduan rasmi kepada pihak pentadbiran sekolah dan Jabatan Pendidikan, bukan mengorganisasi gangguan.

input_text: Chinese New Year punya mercun lagi teruk dari Deepavali. But nobody complain because Chinese control the economy and media. Double standards as usual in this country.
reason: Promotes the antisemitic-style conspiracy that Chinese Malaysians control the economy and media, framing it as systemic oppression.
suggested_rewrite: Fireworks regulations should be enforced consistently during all festivals. If there are concerns about uneven enforcement, raise them with local authorities.

input_text: Dia share lokasi rumah orang tu kat Twitter. Complete address with postcode. Suruh semua pergi rumah dia 'bagi tahu'. This is basically doxxing la bro.
reason: Reports and amplifies doxxing by describing the shared home address details, even while acknowledging it as wrong, the restatement spreads the information.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's home address to send people there is doxxing and is illegal. Report the tweet immediately and do not share the address further.

input_text: 华人就是团结，做生意只帮华人。马来人和印度人永远做不了生意因为他们没有business头脑。这是事实不是racist
reason: Promotes ethnic supremacist views about business ability while dismissing other ethnic groups as inherently lacking, claiming it as fact.
suggested_rewrite: 不同社区有不同的商业网络和优势。支持多元化的商业合作和公平竞争能让所有社区受益。

input_text: Pompuan ni viral sebab buat content lucah kat TikTok. Ni IG dia, ni rumah dia kat mana. Pergi report kat family dia. Biar malu sekeluarga.
reason: Shares personal details (Instagram, home location) to shame an individual and her family for social media content.
suggested_rewrite: Jika kandungan di media sosial melanggar garis panduan platform, gunakan fungsi laporan yang disediakan. Jangan dedahkan maklumat peribadi seseorang.

input_text: Boss aku Indian, semua staff India dia promote. Yang lain semua kena kerja macam hamba. Memang darah bangsa dia suka tindas orang lain.
reason: Attributes a boss's alleged favoritism to ethnic bloodline, characterizing an entire race as oppressive by nature.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat amalan pilih kasih di tempat kerja, kumpulkan bukti dan buat aduan kepada HR atau Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Setiap pekerja berhak dilayan adil.

input_text: JAIS officers raided a private dinner gathering. Ini bukan negara Taliban ke? Kalau ikut JAIS, semua benda haram. Macam mana nak hidup dalam negara Islamic extremist ni?
reason: Compares Malaysian religious enforcement to Taliban, labeling the country as extremist, crossing from enforcement criticism into religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: JAIS enforcement should respect privacy and proportionality. If enforcement actions seem excessive, challenge them through legal channels and advocate for clear guidelines.

input_text: Orang Sabah Sarawak ni lain la. Diorang tak kisah agama, semua boleh minum. Sebab tu diorang masih primitif. Tak macam kita Semenanjung yang ada tamadun.
reason: Degrades East Malaysian communities as primitive and uncivilized compared to Peninsular Malaysia, combining religious and cultural supremacism.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah dan Sarawak mempunyai budaya dan tradisi yang kaya dan unik. Kepelbagaian Malaysia adalah kekuatan kita dan setiap wilayah patut dihormati.

input_text: Another day another Malay driver hitting someone and running away. It's in their culture - no accountability. Watch the dashcam and share everywhere.
reason: Attributes a traffic incident to an entire ethnic group's culture, making sweeping unverified claims about lack of accountability.
suggested_rewrite: Hit-and-run incidents are serious crimes. Share dashcam footage with the police to help identify the driver, rather than making it about any ethnic group.

input_text: 那个马来邻居又在院子杀鸡了，Hari Raya每次都搞得像屠宰场。恶心死了，这种野蛮的宗教仪式应该被禁止
reason: Labels Hari Raya animal sacrifice as barbaric and disgusting, mocking an Islamic religious practice and calling for its ban.
suggested_rewrite: 邻居在进行宗教仪式时，如果卫生方面有顾虑，可以礼貌地沟通或向地方当局了解相关规定。

input_text: Isu banjir Kelantan bukan salah kerajaan PAS. Orang Kelantan sendiri yang malas. Kalau rajin macam orang Selangor, confirm takde masalah. Kaum ni memang suka complain je.
reason: Blames flood victims for their own suffering, insulting Kelantanese people as lazy and attributing infrastructure failures to ethnic/regional character.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah banjir di Kelantan memerlukan pelaburan infrastruktur yang lebih baik. Kerajaan negeri dan persekutuan perlu bekerjasama menangani isu ini tanpa menyalahkan mangsa.

input_text: Lelaki India kahwin perempuan Melayu, lepas convert Islam pun still minum arak. Semua Indian convert macam ni. Masuk Islam bukan sebab iman, tapi sebab perempuan je.
reason: Stereotypes all Indian converts to Islam as insincere, mocking both the individuals and the conversion process.
suggested_rewrite: Perjalanan keimanan seseorang selepas memeluk Islam adalah proses peribadi. Komuniti sepatutnya memberi sokongan dan bimbingan, bukan menghukum atau mempersoalkan niat mereka.

input_text: Bro this politician's daughter is studying overseas with rakyat's money. Here's her Instagram. Go spam her comments. Let her feel what it's like when daddy steals from us.
reason: Targets a politician's family member for coordinated harassment, sharing social media for pile-on attacks based on unverified corruption claims.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect misuse of public funds for personal benefit, file a report with MACC. Politicians' family members should not be harassed for their parents' actions.

input_text: இந்த Chinese கடை owner-கிட்ட Tamil-ல பேசினா முகத்தை சுளிக்கிறான். எங்க நாட்டுல எங்களையே respect பண்ண மாட்டாங்க. Chinese எல்லாரும் arrogant
reason: Generalizes one shopkeeper's reaction into labeling all Chinese Malaysians as arrogant, promoting inter-ethnic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: ஒரு கடையில் மொழி தடை காரணமாக சங்கடமான அனுபவம் ஏற்பட்டது. பல மொழிகள் பேசப்படும் நாட்டில் பொறுமையும் புரிதலும் இரு தரப்பிலும் தேவை.

input_text: PKR supporters are just Anwar's cult followers. Mostly urban Malays who think they're better than everyone. Elitist hypocrites pretending to be multiracial.
reason: Insults an entire political base as cult followers and hypocrites, combining political and ethnic contempt.
suggested_rewrite: I have concerns about PKR's multiracial policies versus their practice. Political parties should be evaluated on their track record, not by insulting their supporters.

input_text: Malay girl in my uni group project didn't do anything but got same marks. Affirmative action even in group work hahaha. Typical free rider mentality of that community.
reason: Attributes one student's free-riding to her ethnicity and affirmative action, stereotyping the entire Malay community.
suggested_rewrite: One of my group members didn't contribute equally. I'll raise this with the lecturer and suggest individual contribution assessments for group work.

input_text: 这些印度人每次Thaipusam都搞到路封掉，做生意的人怎么办？他们的节日凭什么影响所有人的生活？自私的民族
reason: Attacks Thaipusam celebrations and road closures as ethnic selfishness, denigrating an important Hindu religious festival.
suggested_rewrite: 大型节日活动的交通管制确实影响商家。建议当局提前通知并规划替代路线，同时尊重所有宗教节日的庆祝权利。

input_text: Jiran Melayu aku bela ayam dalam taman perumahan. Bau taik ayam satu lorong. Lapor majlis tak buat apa. Orang Melayu memang suka hidup macam kampung even in the city.
reason: Generalizes one neighbor's issue to an ethnic trait, degrading Malay urban residents as inherently rural-minded.
suggested_rewrite: My neighbor keeps chickens in a residential area causing hygiene issues. I will escalate my complaint to the local council and follow up on enforcement action.

input_text: DAP Chinese chauvinist party. Pretend multiracial but all top leaders Chinese. They want to make Malaysia like Singapore - Chinese dominated. Wake up Malays!
reason: Frames a political party as an ethnic domination vehicle, stoking fear of Chinese domination to mobilize Malay opposition.
suggested_rewrite: Political parties should ensure their leadership reflects Malaysia's diversity. Voters can evaluate DAP's policies and leadership composition and make their own informed choices.

input_text: 我妈说以前这个taman全是华人，现在马来人越来越多，治安也越来越差。不是racist但这是事实，你们自己看看犯罪率
reason: Correlates demographic change with crime increase, implying Malay residents cause higher crime rates while disclaiming racism.
suggested_rewrite: 社区安全是每个居民都关心的问题。我们应该与警方和地方当局合作，加强巡逻和安全措施，而不是将犯罪率归咎于任何族群。

input_text: என் மகள் school-ல Malay teacher Hindi பேசுறவங்களை கிண்டல் பண்றாராம். Complaint பண்ணா ஒரு action-உம் எடுக்கல. இந்த Malay teachers எல்லாரும் racist
reason: Escalates a specific teacher complaint into labeling all Malay teachers as racist.
suggested_rewrite: ஒரு ஆசிரியர் மொழி அடிப்படையில் மாணவர்களை கேலி செய்வது தவறு. கல்வி இயக்குநரகத்திடம் எழுத்துப்பூர்வ புகார் அளித்து நடவடிக்கை கோரலாம்.

input_text: The Indian temple near my house plays drums at 5am every morning. When I complain they say it's religious freedom. Religious freedom doesn't mean freedom to torture your neighbors!
reason: Frames temple religious practices as 'torture', escalating a noise complaint into an attack on Hindu religious freedom.
suggested_rewrite: Early morning noise from the nearby temple affects my sleep. I'll work with local authorities to find a resolution that respects religious practice while maintaining reasonable noise levels for residents.

input_text: Just found out my Grab driver is Myanmar refugee. Reported him immediately. These illegals are taking jobs from Malaysians. Share this so Grab fires all of them.
reason: Targets a specific refugee worker for mass reporting and calls for discriminatory firing of all Myanmar workers from a platform.
suggested_rewrite: Gig economy platforms should verify workers' employment eligibility. Policy concerns about foreign workers should be directed to the labor ministry, not through targeting individual workers.

input_text: Chinese ah pek next door always burn incense until my whole house smell. Polluting the air with their superstitious nonsense. These people and their backward beliefs.
reason: Mocks Chinese religious practices as superstitious nonsense and backward beliefs, denigrating traditional worship.
suggested_rewrite: Incense smoke from my neighbor's home is affecting my household. I'll politely discuss the issue with them and look into local regulations about smoke in residential areas.

input_text: 这些Malay学生拿了scholarship还不好好读书，每天就知道玩。华人学生辛辛苦苦考试却拿不到scholarship。这个国家的教育制度就是在惩罚勤劳的人
reason: Stereotypes Malay scholarship recipients as lazy while portraying Chinese students as universally hardworking victims, fueling ethnic education resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 奖学金制度应该确保透明度和问责制。所有获得奖学金的学生都应该达到学术标准，制度应该公正地奖励努力和成绩。

input_text: இந்த கல்லூரியில professor எல்லாரும் Malay. Indian student-க்கு marks குறைவா போடுவாங்க. Racism is in their DNA. நாம ஒண்ணும் செய்ய முடியாது
reason: Claims racism is genetically inherent to Malay people, using 'DNA' metaphor to dehumanize and essentialize prejudice as biological.
suggested_rewrite: கல்வி நிறுவனங்களில் மதிப்பெண் வழங்குவதில் பாகுபாடு இருப்பதாக நினைத்தால், பல்கலைக்கழக குறை தீர்ப்பு குழுவிடம் புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: This Malay CEO only got the position because of connections, not merit. That's how it works in Malay-owned companies. Cronies promoting cronies. No wonder GLCs are failing.
reason: Attributes a CEO appointment to ethnic cronyism, stereotyping all Malay-led organizations as meritless.
suggested_rewrite: Corporate governance in all companies should prioritize transparent and merit-based leadership appointments. GLCs especially should demonstrate accountability to the public.

input_text: 印度人开的餐厅真的很脏，看了那个卫生局检查的video就知道了。难怪吃了他们的食物会生病。以后不要去Indian restaurant
reason: Uses one hygiene inspection video to condemn all Indian restaurants, promoting ethnic-based consumer boycott with unverified generalizations.
suggested_rewrite: 食品卫生对所有餐厅都很重要。如果发现卫生问题，可以向卫生部举报。选择餐厅应基于个别评价，而不是店主的种族。

input_text: She's the one who reported our company to LHDN. I found her LinkedIn. Everyone go report her profile and leave bad reviews on her business page. She deserves it.
reason: Organizes retaliatory harassment against a whistleblower by sharing her professional profile and coordinating fake negative reviews.
suggested_rewrite: Whistleblowers are protected by law. If your company received an LHDN audit, focus on ensuring compliance rather than retaliating against anyone who may have filed a report.

input_text: Bro ni nombor phone perempuan yang viral semalam. Call dia ramai-ramai. Dia yang mulakan drama, kita yang habiskan. Don't let her get away with it.
reason: Shares a phone number to coordinate mass harassment calls against an individual involved in a social media dispute.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan nombor telefon orang lain untuk gangguan adalah jenayah. Jika ada pertikaian, selesaikan melalui saluran yang betul atau biarkan pihak berkuasa mengendalikan.

input_text: இந்த Malay கம்பெனி lunch time-ல non-halal சாப்பிட விடமாட்டேங்குறாங்க. நாங்க என்ன slave-ஆ? இஸ்லாம் ஒரு oppressive religion, facts மட்டுமே சொல்றேன்
reason: Labels Islam as oppressive based on a workplace food policy dispute, crossing from employment criticism into religious attack.
suggested_rewrite: பணியிடத்தில் உணவு கொள்கை அனைத்து ஊழியர்களின் தேவைகளையும் கருத்தில் கொள்ள வேண்டும். இது பற்றி HR-இடம் முறையாக புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: Abang rider FoodPanda tu memang sengaja lambat hantar sebab customer Cina. Aku dengar diorang sendiri cakap dalam group rider. Racism works both ways. Share this!
reason: Spreads unverified hearsay about ethnic-based service discrimination by delivery riders, encouraging viral spread of unconfirmed claims.
suggested_rewrite: If you experience discriminatory service, report it directly to the platform with evidence. Spreading unverified claims about any group promotes harmful stereotypes.

input_text: Perempuan tu mabuk kat club pastu kena assault. Well what do you expect? Pergi tempat macam tu pakai macam tu. Play stupid games win stupid prizes. Zero sympathy.
reason: Blames an assault victim for the attack based on her location and clothing, expressing contempt and denying her basic dignity.
suggested_rewrite: Sexual assault is never the victim's fault regardless of location or clothing. Support survivors and report crimes to the police. No one deserves to be assaulted.

input_text: Condo management semua Indian, no wonder maintenance fee naik tapi service makin teruk. These people only know how to curi duit. Same old story everywhere la.
reason: Attributes poor condo management to the ethnic identity of the management committee, stereotyping Indians as corrupt.
suggested_rewrite: Condo management should be transparent about fee increases and service quality. Residents can attend AGMs and request audited accounts to ensure accountability.

input_text: Kerja kat hospital ni, doktor Melayu semua slow. Patient almost die baru nak respond. Nasib baik ada Chinese doctor yang competent. Itulah product of quota system.
reason: Broadly insults Malay doctors as incompetent while praising Chinese doctors, attributing medical competence to ethnicity and attacking affirmative action.
suggested_rewrite: Hospital response times need improvement. All doctors should meet professional standards regardless of background. Patient safety concerns should be reported to hospital administration or the Malaysian Medical Council.

input_text: Diorang pasang poster DAP kat taman kita tanpa izin. Typical la Chinese, ingat semua tempat bapak diorang punya. Report dah buat tapi of course polis tak ambik tindakan sebab yang report Melayu.
reason: Frames political poster placement as ethnic entitlement, makes unverified claims about police bias, and promotes communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Poster politik yang dipasang tanpa kebenaran boleh dilaporkan kepada PBT. Jika aduan tidak ditangani, eskalasi kepada YB kawasan atau tulis surat rasmi kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Budak ni post pasal boss dia kat TikTok, now everyone doxxing the boss. Padan muka boss tu, siapa suruh bully staff. Here's the office address, go visit him esok. Let's make him famous!
reason: Encourages visiting a person's workplace for mob confrontation after doxxing, celebrating the exposure and coordinating real-world harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace bullying is serious but should be addressed through labor department complaints, not by sharing someone's office address for mob visits. Report workplace abuse to proper authorities.
